author: Nintendo Everything
text:
RoadOut launch trailer – post-apocalyptic action RPG out on Nintendo Switch

To celebrate the game’s release, Dangen Entertainment and Rastrolabs have released a launch trailer for RoadOut. This is a post-apocalyptic mix of action RPG, rock n’ racing, and dungeon-crawling. Tons of details can be found in the following overview: RoadOut is a story-driven action RPG that combines twin stick action with rubber-burning driving mechanics. Explore a vast post-apocalyptic world in...

The post RoadOut launch trailer – post-apocalyptic action RPG out on Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Tale of Dark Lands heading to Nintendo Switch

Sometimes You today announced a partnership with Satur Entertainment to bring Tale of Dark Lands to Nintendo Switch. It’s due out on June 2, 2026. Tale of Dark Lands is a magical fantasy action RPG with a low-poly style. In the game, players will experience a story in which a brave mercenary defends a village from goblin raids, but the...

The post Tale of Dark Lands heading to Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Tactics RPG Diorama Break confirms Nintendo Switch release

After raising enough funds on Kickstarter, Studio Massimo Gauthier has confirmed plans to bring Diorama Break to Nintendo Switch. The game was able to raise about $70,000 in total. Along with funding the game itself, hitting the Kickstarter goal secured a Nintendo Switch version. Diorama Break is described as a tactics RPG in which players can talk directly to the...

The post Tactics RPG Diorama Break confirms Nintendo Switch release appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
